message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant AdministratorTU as "AdministratorTU"
participant Dashboard_V as "Dashboard_V"
participant KontrolSPTBKA_V as "KontrolSPTBKA_V"
participant Admin_C as "Admin_C"
participant KontrolSPT_C as "KontrolSPT_C"
participant SuratPerintahTugas_E as "SuratPerintahTugas_E"

note over AdministratorTU, KontrolSPTBKA_V, KontrolSPT_C, SuratPerintahTugas_E
  Memverifikasi SPT BKA
end note

Actor AdministratorTU as "AdministratorTU"

note over Dashboard_V, KontrolSPTBKA_V, KontrolSPT_C, SuratPerintahTugas_E
  load->view()
end note

note over AdministratorTU, Dashboard_V, KontrolSPTBKA_V, KontrolSPT_C, SuratPerintahTugas_E
  Halaman Dashboard
end note

note over AdministratorTU, Dashboard_V, KontrolSPTBKA_V, KontrolSPT_C, SuratPerintahTugas_E
  klik menu SPT BKA
end note

note over Dashboard_V, KontrolSPTBKA_V, KontrolSPT_C, SuratPerintahTugas_E
  kontrolsptbka()
end note

note over KontrolSPTBKA_V, KontrolSPT_C, SuratPerintahTugas_E
  load->view()
end note

note over KontrolSPTBKA_V, KontrolSPT_C, SuratPerintahTugas_E
  Halaman SPT BKA
end note

note over AdministratorTU, KontrolSPTBKA_V, KontrolSPT_C, SuratPerintahTugas_E
  klik tombol Accept SPT BKA
end note

note over KontrolSPTBKA_V, KontrolSPT_C, SuratPerintahTugas_E
  acceptsptbkalengkap()
end note

note over KontrolSPT_C, SuratPerintahTugas_E
  11
end note

note over KontrolSPT_C, SuratPerintahTugas_E
  12
end note

note over KontrolSPT_C, SuratPerintahTugas_E
  load->view()
end note

note over KontrolSPT_C, SuratPerintahTugas_E
  Halaman SPT BKA
end note

note over AdministratorTU, KontrolSPTBKA_V, KontrolSPT_C, SuratPerintahTugas_E
  load->view()
end note

note over AdministratorTU, KontrolSPTBKA_V, KontrolSPT_C, SuratPerintahTugas_E
  Halaman SPT BKA
end note

@enduml
